name: github_set_custom_labels_for_self_hosted_runner_for_org
description: Replace all custom labels for a self-hosted runner configured in an organization (PUT /orgs/{org}/actions/runners/{runner_id}/labels). Provide labels (0-100); an empty array removes all custom labels (read-only labels remain). Returns the full updated label set. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. See GitHub REST self-hosted runners.
